parameters.name: previewgrid
parameters.label: Preview Grid
parameters.description: This outputs an image showing the effect of all operation types in a grid, with the inputs swapped on the right side of each tile.

parameters.name: selectinput
parameters.label: Select Input
parameters.description: Instead of doing the composites, this causes only one of the inputs to pass through.

parameters.name: inputindex
parameters.label: Input Index
parameters.description: When passing through an input with Select Input on, this is the index of the image that is passed through.

parameters.name: operand
parameters.label: Operation
parameters.description: Choose which composite operation is performed from this menu. Search the web for 'blend modes' for more detailed information on the effects of each type.

parameters.name: swaporder
parameters.label: Swap Operation Order
parameters.description: Swaps the order of the input pairs. A operation B is changed to B operation A. Operations like Add don't matter, but many do, like Over and Hard Light.

parameters.name: size
parameters.label: Fixed Layer
parameters.description: The selected input will become the fixed layer and the other input will be the overlay. This does not change the order of the composite (Input1 + Input2), only which layer is considered fixed and whic

parameters.name: prefit
parameters.label: Pre-Fit Overlay
parameters.description: Determines how the Overlay layer (Overlay layer is the input that is NOT the Fixed Layer) fills the composite.

parameters.name: justifyh
parameters.label: Justify Horizontal
parameters.description: Specify the horizontal alignment of the Overlay.

parameters.name: justifyv
parameters.label: Justify Vertical
parameters.description: Specify the vertical alignment of the Overlay.

parameters.name: extend
parameters.label: Extend Overlay
parameters.description: Sets the extend (or repeat) conditions of the Overlay layer. This parameter determines what happens at the edges of the Overlay layer.

parameters.name: r
parameters.label: Rotate
parameters.description: Rotates the Overlay layer. Increasing values rotate clockwise, decreasing values rotate counter-clockwise.

parameters.name: tunit
parameters.label: Translate Units
parameters.description: Sets the units used in the Translate parameter.

parameters.name: punit
parameters.label: Pivot Units
parameters.description: Sets the units used in the Pivot parameter.

parameters.name: tstepunit
parameters.label: Translate Step Units
parameters.description: Sets the units used in the Translate Step parameter

parameters.name: legacyxform
parameters.label: Legacy Transform
parameters.description: When enabled, will use the legacy method of building the transform matrix, which has inverted rotation and transform order.

parameters.name: py
parameters.label: Py
parameters.description: Allows you to define the point about which the Overlay layer scales and rotates. Altering the pivot point produces different results depending on the Transform Order.

parameters.name: tops
parameters.label: Tops
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: ty
parameters.label: Ty
parameters.description: Translates the Overlay layer in x and y.

parameters.name: sy
parameters.label: Sy
parameters.description: Scales the Overlay layer in x and y.

parameters.name: tstepy
parameters.label: Tstepy
parameters.description: Translates the Overlay layers cumulatively, starting at the 3rd input (index 2). That layer is translated by the amount specified, the next layer is translated by 2 times that amount, the following la

examples.label: Set additive blending
examples.description: Combine inputs with additive blending for glow effects.

examples.label: Set multiply blending
examples.description: Multiply inputs together for masking and darkening.

examples.label: Layer with alpha over
examples.description: Standard alpha compositing: foreground over background.
